mapper.select:
SELECT getCustName(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD) ||' '|| getDeptName(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, PRDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) PR_BUYER_NM , GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'M061', PRDT.PURCHASE_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) as PURCHASE_TYPE , getCustName(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.EC_BUYER_CD) ||' '|| getDeptName(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.EC_BUYER_CD, PRDT.EC_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) EC_BUYER_NM , PRDT.PR_NUM , PRHD.SUBJECT , PRDT.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , (PRDT.RECEIPT_FLAG , '0') RECEIPT_FLAG , GETTOCHAR (PRHD.REQ_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REQ_DATE , GETUSERNAME(PRHD.GATE_CD, PRHD.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM , PRDT.ITEM_CD , PRDT.ITEM_DESC , PRDT.ITEM_SPEC , PRDT.MAKER_PART_NO , GETMKBRNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, 'MK', PRDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , PRDT.PR_QT , PRDT.UNIT_CD , PRHD.CUR , PRDT.UNIT_PRC , PRDT.PR_AMT , PRDT.VAT_TYPE , GETTOCHAR (PRDT.DUE_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS DUE_DATE , GETVENDORNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REC_VENDOR_NM , PRDT.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE , PRDT.SUBMIT_TYPE , PRDT.AMT_TYPE , PRDT.BUYER_CD , PRDT.PR_SQ , PRHD.IF_TYPE ,(PRHD.PR_TYPE, '10') AS PR_TYPE , PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD , PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM , PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT , PRDT.CM_REQ_ID ,(SELECT MAX(A.CONT_USER_ID) FROM STOCECCT A WHERE A.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PRE_CTRL_USER_ID -- 이전계약차수 계약담당자ID ,GETUSERNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, (SELECT MAX(A.CONT_USER_ID) FROM STOCECCT A WHERE A.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = PRDT.PRE_BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = PRDT.PRE_CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = PRDT.PRE_CONT_CNT AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0'), #{ses.langCd}) AS PRE_CTRL_USER_NM FROM STOCPRDT PRDT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM) WHERE PRHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND PRDT.EC_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND PRHD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E'
AND PRHD.REQ_DATE >= (#{REQ_DATE_FROM}) AND PRHD.REQ_DATE <= (#{REQ_DATE_TO})
AND UPPER( PRHD.PR_NUM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(PRHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PR_SUBJECT}, ' ', '')) '%'
AND PRHD.IF_TYPE = #{IF_TYPE}
AND PRDT.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD}
AND PRDT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND PRDT.CTRL_USER_ID is not null
AND PRDT.CTRL_USER_ID is null
AND 1 = 1
AND UPPER(PRHD.REQ_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(PRHD.GATE_CD, PRHD.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND PRDT.CM_REQ_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CM_REQ_ID}) '%'
AND (PRHD.PR_TYPE, '10') = #{PR_TYPE}
ORDER BY PRHD.REQ_DATE DESC , PRDT.PR_NUM DESC , PRDT.PR_SQ

SELECT CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM STOCBACP BACP JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON( CVUR.GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = BACP.BUYER_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CVUR.USER_TYPE = 'B' AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE BACP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACP.CTRL_CD = 'BR030' AND BACP.CTRL_USER_ID = #{CTRL_USER_ID} AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BACP.USE_FLAG = '1'
SELECT (CASE WHEN USER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS IS_FLAG FROM STOCUSER WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCPOHB ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,DEPT_CD ,PO_WT_NUM ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,PR_NUM ,PR_SQ ,PO_CREATE_TYPE ,ITEM_CD ,CTRL_USER_ID ,CTRL_CD ,VENDOR_CD ,CUR ,PO_QT ,UNIT_PRC ,ITEM_AMT ,PURCHASE_TYPE ,DEL_FLAG ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,ITEM_DESC ,ITEM_SPEC ,MAKER_CD ,MAKER_PART_NO ,ORIGIN_CD ,SUBJECT ,UNIT_CD ,VAT_TYPE ,REQ_USER_ID ,PR_BUYER_CD ,PR_DEPT_CD ,PB_BUYER_CD ) SELECT #{ses.gateCd} --GATE_CD ,#{EC_BUYER_CD} --BUYER_CD ,#{EC_DEPT_CD} ,#{PO_WT_NUM} --PO_WT_NUM ,SYSDATE --REG_DATE ,#{ses.userId} --REG_USER_ID ,#{PR_NUM} --PR_NUM ,#{PR_SQ} --PR_SQ ,'LAST' --PO_CREATE_TYPE ,#{ITEM_CD} --ITEM_CD ,#{CTRL_USER_ID} --CTRL_USER_ID ,#{CTRL_CD} --CTRL_CD ,#{VENDOR_CD} --VENDOR_CD ,#{CUR} --CUR ,#{PR_QT} --PO_QT ,INFO.UNIT_PRC --UNIT_PRC ,#{PR_QT} * INFO.UNIT_PRC --ITEM_AMT ,#{PURCHASE_TYPE} --PURCHASE_TYPE ,'0' --DEL_FLAG ,SYSDATE --MOD_DATE ,#{ses.userId} --MOD_USER_ID ,#{ITEM_DESC} --ITEM_DESC ,#{ITEM_SPEC} --ITEM_SPEC ,#{MAKER_CD} --MAKER_CD ,#{MAKER_PART_NO} --MAKER_PART_NO ,#{ORIGIN_CD} --ORIGIN_CD ,#{SUBJECT} --SUBJECT ,#{UNIT_CD} --UNIT_CD ,#{VAT_TYPE} --VAT_TYPE ,#{REG_USER_ID} --REQ_USER_ID ,#{PR_BUYER_CD} --PR_BUYER_CD ,#{PR_DEPT_CD} --PR_DEPT_CD ,#{PB_BUYER_CD} FROM STOCINFO INFO WHERE INFO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND INFO.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND INFO.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND INFO.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND INFO.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND INFO.ITEM_CD = #{ITEM_CD} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: SELECT A.CM_REQ_ID ,A.OFFICE_DOCU_NUM ,A.MNT_TYPE ,( SELECT LISTAGG( GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'NH0015', BZ_PART_ID, #{ses.langCd}) , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY BZ_PART_ID) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_REL_BZ_PART WHERE CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) BZ_PART_NM FROM TBT_CM_REQ_INFO A WHERE CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT A.CM_PR_CORP ,A.CM_TR_CORP ,A.CM_REQ_DET_NM ,A.BZ_TIMELINE_SDAY ,A.BZ_TIMELINE_EDAY ,( SELECT CODE_NAME FROM TBT_PT_CODE WHERE UPPER_CODE = 'CM001_02_00' AND CODE = A.CM_CLASS_NM ) CM_CLASS_NM ,( SELECT CODE_NAME FROM TBT_PT_CODE WHERE UPPER_CODE = 'CM001_01_00' AND CODE = A.CM_TYPE ) CM_TYPE ,A.OM_COMP_NM ,A.C_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.A_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.B_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.F_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.E_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.C_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT+A.A_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT+A.B_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT+A.F_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT+A.E_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT TOTAL_DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,( SELECT LISTAGG(DAMDANG_USER_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY DAMDANG_USER_NM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_D1 WHERE CM_REQ_DET_ID = A.CM_REQ_DET_ID AND CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) DAMDANG_USER_NM ,CASE WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '001' THEN '계약규정 제6조' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '002' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 가목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '003' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 나목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '004' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 아목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '005' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 타목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '006' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 바목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '007' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 차목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '008' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 16호' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '009' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제32조 1호' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '010' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제29조' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '011' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 가목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '012' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 나목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '013' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 다목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '014' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 라목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '015' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제38조 제1항 제2호' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '016' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제39조 1항' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '017' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제29조 ' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '018' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제63조 ' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '099' THEN '직접입력' ELSE A.CM_PROVISION END CM_PROVISION ,A.CM_SAYU FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M A WHERE A.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT A.CM_PR_CORP ,( SELECT LISTAGG(CM_REQ_DET_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY CM_REQ_DET_NM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M WHERE CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) CM_REQ_DET_NM ,A.AM_TYPE ,A.MULPUM_GBN ,A.ACC_HNG_NM
,( SELECT CODE_NAME FROM TBT_PT_CODE WHERE UPPER_CODE = 'grp000_AM003' AND CODE = A.AM_CATE_TYPE ) AM_CATE_TYPE
,A.MULPUM_NM ,A.DOIB_YONGDO ,A.DOIB_DESC
,CASE WHEN A.MNG_AM_YN = 'Y' THEN '여' ELSE '부' END MNG_AM_YN
,CASE WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'I' THEN '도입' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'Z' THEN '무상' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'Y' THEN '기증' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'X' THEN '리스' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'W' THEN '임대' ELSE '' END ASSET_TYPE
,A.MAF_COMP ,A.LICEN_TYPE ,A.AM_CNT ,A.AM_CNT_DANWI ,A.FRT_CLS_MM ,A.MID_CLS_MM ,A.HIG_CLS_MM ,A.SPC_CLS_MM ,A.TOT_TUIB_GONGSU ,A.CONSUME_BY_AMOUNT ,A.CONSUME_AMOUNT ,A.C_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.A_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.B_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.F_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.E_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,( SELECT LISTAGG( '['||GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'NH0015', BZ_PART_ID, #{ses.langCd})||']'|| BDGT_BUSEO_NM||'('|| replace(TO_CHAR(BDGT_AMOUNT,'999,999,999,999'),' ','') ||')' , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY BDGT_BUSEO_NM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_BDGT WHERE MULPUM_ID = A.MULPUM_ID ) BDGT_BUSEO_NM ,( SELECT LISTAGG(PAY_BUSEO_NM , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY PAY_BUSEO_NM ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_PAY WHERE MULPUM_ID = A.MULPUM_ID ) PAY_BUSEO_NM ,( SELECT LISTAGG(ACQUI_BUSEO_NM , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY ACQUI_BUSEO_NM ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_ACQUI WHERE MULPUM_ID = A.MULPUM_ID ) ACQUI_BUSEO_NM ,( SELECT LISTAGG(GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'NH0015', BZ_PART_ID, #{ses.langCd}) , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY BZ_PART_ID ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_REL_BZ_PART WHERE CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) BZ_PART_NM FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_SPEC A WHERE CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT A.CM_PR_CORP ,( SELECT LISTAGG(CM_REQ_DET_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY CM_REQ_DET_NM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M WHERE CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) CM_REQ_DET_NM ,A.AM_TYPE ,A.MULPUM_GBN ,A.ACC_HNG_NM
,( SELECT CODE_NAME FROM TBT_PT_CODE WHERE UPPER_CODE = 'grp000_AM003' AND CODE = A.AM_CATE_TYPE ) AM_CATE_TYPE
,A.MULPUM_NM ,A.DOIB_YONGDO ,A.DOIB_DESC
,CASE WHEN A.MNG_AM_YN = 'Y' THEN '여' ELSE '부' END MNG_AM_YN
,CASE WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'I' THEN '도입' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'Z' THEN '무상' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'Y' THEN '기증' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'X' THEN '리스' WHEN A.ASSET_TYPE = 'W' THEN '임대' ELSE '' END ASSET_TYPE
,A.MAF_COMP ,A.LICEN_TYPE ,A.AM_CNT ,A.AM_CNT_DANWI ,A.CLS_GRADE ,A.TOT_TUIB_GONGSU ,A.CONSUME_BY_AMOUNT ,A.CONSUME_AMOUNT ,A.C_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.A_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.B_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.F_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.E_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,A.ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ,( SELECT LISTAGG( '['||GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'NH0015', BZ_PART_ID, #{ses.langCd})||']'|| BDGT_BUSEO_NM||'('|| replace(TO_CHAR(BDGT_AMOUNT,'999,999,999,999'),' ','') ||')' , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY BDGT_BUSEO_NM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_BDGT WHERE MULPUM_ID = A.MULPUM_ID ) BDGT_BUSEO_NM ,( SELECT LISTAGG(PAY_BUSEO_NM , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY PAY_BUSEO_NM ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_PAY WHERE MULPUM_ID = A.MULPUM_ID ) PAY_BUSEO_NM ,( SELECT LISTAGG(ACQUI_BUSEO_NM , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY ACQUI_BUSEO_NM ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_ACQUI WHERE MULPUM_ID = A.MULPUM_ID ) ACQUI_BUSEO_NM ,( SELECT LISTAGG(GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'NH0015', BZ_PART_ID, #{ses.langCd}) , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY BZ_PART_ID ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_REL_BZ_PART WHERE CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) BZ_PART_NM FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_SPEC A WHERE CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT A.OM_COMP_NM ,SUBSTR(B.SYSMODTIME,0,8) SYSMODTIME ,B.WRITTEN_BY_NM ,B.ATTACH_TITLE FROM TBT_CM_REQ_D2 A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBT_CM_ATTACH B ON A.CM_REQ_ID = B.CM_KEY_ID(+) AND A.REC_NUM = B.REC_NUM(+) AND B.TYPE = '01' WHERE A.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT ( SELECT CODE_NAME FROM TBT_PT_CODE WHERE UPPER_CODE = 'CM001_01_00' AND CODE = A.CM_TYPE ) CM_TYPE ,A.OM_COMP_NM ,A.DOIB_AMOUNT ,A.MNT_GUR_MONTH ,( SELECT SUM(MNT_AMOUNT) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_STND_MNT WHERE CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) MNT_AMOUNT , ( SELECT CODE_NAME FROM TBT_PT_CODE WHERE UPPER_CODE = 'CM001_04_00' AND CODE = A.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD ) PAY_PERIOD_MTHD , ( SELECT CODE_NAME FROM TBT_PT_CODE WHERE UPPER_CODE = 'CM002_04_00' AND CODE = A.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD2 ) PAY_PERIOD_MTHD2 ,A.MNT_TOT_HOECHA ,A.GISANIL ,A.PAY_DEPT_NM AAAA ,( SELECT LISTAGG(DAMDANG_USER_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY DAMDANG_USER_NM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_D1 WHERE CM_REQ_ID = A.CM_REQ_ID ) DAMDANG_USER_NM ,CASE WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '001' THEN '계약규정 제6조' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '002' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 가목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '003' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 나목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '004' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 아목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '005' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 타목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '006' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 바목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '007' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 차목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '008' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 16호' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '009' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제32조 1호' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '010' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제29조' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '011' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 가목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '012' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 나목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '013' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 다목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '014' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 라목' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '015' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제38조 제1항 제2호' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '016' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제39조 1항' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '017' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제29조 ' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '018' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제63조 ' WHEN A.CM_PROVISION = '099' THEN '직접입력' ELSE A.CM_PROVISION END CM_PROVISION ,A.CM_SAYU FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M A WHERE A.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT DM1.CM_PR_CORP ,( SELECT CM_REQ_DET_NM FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M WHERE CM_REQ_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) CM_REQ_DET_NM ,DM2.MNT_GRADE ,DM2.INTRO_YONGDO DOIB_YONGDO ,DM2.ASSET_NO GIJON_ASSET_MNG_NO ,DM2.ASSET_NM MULPUM_NM ,DM2.MAF_COMP ,( SELECT DOIB_NUM FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M WHERE CM_REQ_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) DOIB_NUM ,'' CONT_NM ,DM2.AM_CNT --,DM1.TOT_TUIB_GONGSU --,DM1.LICEN_TYPE ,'' LICEN_VER ,( SELECT LISTAGG(ACQUI_BUSEO_NM , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY ACQUI_BUSEO_NM ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_ACQUI WHERE ACQUI_BUSEO_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_ID ) ACQUI_BUSEO_NM ,( SELECT LISTAGG(GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'NH0015', BZ_PART_ID, #{ses.langCd}) , ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY BZ_PART_ID ) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_REL_BZ_PART WHERE CM_REQ_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_ID ) BZ_PART_NM FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M DM1 LEFT OUTER JOIN TBT_CM_REQ_DET_STND_MNT DM2 ON DM2.CM_REQ_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_ID AND DM2.CM_REQ_DET_ID LIKE DM1.CM_REQ_DET_ID||'%' WHERE DM1.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT A.OM_COMP_NM ,SUBSTR(B.SYSMODTIME,0,8) SYSMODTIME ,B.WRITTEN_BY_NM ,B.ATTACH_TITLE FROM TBT_CM_REQ_D2 A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBT_CM_ATTACH B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_PATH AND B.TYPE = '01' WHERE A.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , CVUR.USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_CTRL' '@@' CVUR.USER_ID AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCCVUR CVUR JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{CTRL_USER_ID}
